name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)
description: Professional-level certification for experienced solutions architects designing complex, multi-tier applications on AWS. Validates advanced technical skills in designing for organizational complexity. 2+ years hands-on experience. 75 questions, 180 minutes, 750/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document contains practice exam questions related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification.

### Certification context
This certification validates advanced expertise in:
- Designing solutions for organizational complexity
- Multi-account, multi-region, and hybrid architectures
- Designing for business continuity and security
- Workload migration and modernization

### Purpose
This document compiles practice exam questions for study and review. Each question includes:
- The complete original question statement from the practice exam
- Justification explaining the concept behind the correct answer and the errors in the incorrect alternatives.

### Learning objective
Serve as reference material for discussion and deeper understanding of advanced solutions architecture concepts on AWS.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Design Solutions for Organizational Complexity
domains.description: Domain 1 (26%): Architect network connectivity strategies (hybrid, multi-region), design multi-account AWS environments, prescribe security controls.

domains.name: Design for New Solutions
domains.description: Domain 2 (29%): Design deployment strategies for business requirements, design solutions for business continuity, determine security controls for new solutions.

domains.name: Continuous Improvement for Existing Solutions
domains.description: Domain 3 (25%): Determine strategy to improve overall operational excellence, improve deployment strategy, improve reliability, improve performance, improve security.

domains.name: Accelerate Workload Migration and Modernization
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Select existing workloads for migration, determine optimal migration approach, determine new architecture for modernization.
